SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-03-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-03-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN FEENEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF YI PING SU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CONRAD HOUSE. INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SU, YI PING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONARD HOUSE, INC. $635.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $635.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
